diagrams.title: Branch and Bound State Space Tree
diagrams.description: Tree showing how B&B explores solution space with pruning
diagrams.purpose: Visualize B&B tree traversal and pruning concept

diagrams.title: FIFO vs LIFO Exploration
diagrams.description: Comparison of queue-based and stack-based B&B traversal
elements: FIFO tree: Level by level left to right
LIFO tree: Depth first leftmost path
diagrams.purpose: Understand different search strategies in B&B

diagrams.title: Pruning Condition in B&B
diagrams.description: Visual representation of pruning decision logic
diagrams.purpose: Understand when to prune nodes based on bounds

diagrams.title: 0/1 Knapsack B&B Example
diagrams.description: State space tree for knapsack with capacity constraint
diagrams.purpose: Apply B&B to classic knapsack optimization problem
